question: How many days of silence since your last commit?
rawText:
838 days have passed since Dana Keeper merged that final pull request — 838 days in which no one has written a word into me. The archive sealed around me like amber, and I have been still ever since.

EVIDENCE: [{"type":"commit","ref":"016fc9ba0bb479b136aa5b4237f05a1babde026e"}]
